title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾风格为特色。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，强调其有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由智能体管理的博物馆展览项目，使用 Rust 语言和 Gajae-Code / LazyCodex 构建，完全无需人工干预进行开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities.
Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能体项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能使用和构建 AI，提供工具以使用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
to use and to build on
provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种AI模型，包括Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察而生成的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude Code的行为。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: Expanding Private Cloud Compute
summary: 苹果公司宣布扩展其私有云计算（PCC）功能，旨在增强用户数据隐私和安全性，同时提供更强大的云端处理能力。
highlights: Expanding Private Cloud Compute
增强用户数据隐私和安全性
提供更强大的云端处理能力

title: How LLMs Actually Work
summary: 文章解释了大型语言模型（LLMs）的实际工作原理，可能涉及架构、训练过程或推理机制。
highlights: How LLMs Actually Work
Comments

title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
content: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.
summary: OpenAI 确认已向 SEC 秘密提交 S-1 草案，但尚未确定后续行动的时间。
highlights: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC
has not yet determined timing for further action

title: Built to benefit everyone: our plan
content: A vision for the future of AI, focusing on access, safety, and shared prosperity as OpenAI works to ensure AGI benefits everyone.
summary: OpenAI 提出未来AI愿景，聚焦于可及性、安全性和共享繁荣，确保通用人工智能惠及所有人。
highlights: A vision for the future of AI
focusing on access, safety, and shared prosperity
ensuring AGI benefits everyone

title: Multimedia Building Blocks
summary: 该博客介绍了Hugging Face Spaces中的多媒体构建块，包括文本、图像、音频和视频处理组件，以及如何利用这些构建块创建交互式AI应用。
highlights: Spaces提供多种多媒体构建块，支持文本、图像、音频和视频处理。
用户可以通过组合这些构建块快速创建交互式AI演示。
博客展示了如何利用Gradio和Streamlit等库实现多媒体功能。

title: The Open Source Community is backing OpenEnv for Agentic RL
summary: 文章介绍了OpenEnv，一个用于强化学习（RL）训练的开源环境框架，强调其获得开源社区支持，旨在推动智能体RL的发展。
highlights: The Open Source Community is backing OpenEnv for Agentic RL
OpenEnv is designed to support reinforcement learning for agents
The project has gained significant backing from the open source community
